docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
并查集是一种管理元素所属集合的数据结构，其用一个森林实现，一棵树维护个集合

操作:

  • find(u): 查询元素 u 的所属集合
    • 复杂度 : $O(1)$
  • merge(u, v): 将元素 u, v 的所属集合合并
    • 复杂度 : $O(1)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] >= g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
树状数组是一种维护序列前缀信息的数据结构，该信息需要满足结合律

  • 结合律: 设 $L$ 为左半部分信息，$R$ 为右半部分信息，那么需要满足 $L \ opt \ R = R \ opt \ L$

操作:

  • update(u, x): 将原序列的 u 位置依据 x 去更新
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • query(u, x): 以 x 为初始值查询原序列 $[1, u]$ 的前缀信息
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • find_first(x): 查询前缀信息 <= x 的最左位置
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename T> struct fenwick_tree {
public:
    #define lowbit(x) (x & -x)
    fenwick_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(_n + 1) {}
    fenwick_tree(std::vector<T> Init)
    : fenwick_tree(Init.size() - 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            f[i] += Init[i];
            if (i + lowbit(i) <= n) {
                f[i + lowbit(i)] += f[i];
            }
        }
    }
    auto update(int u, T x) -> void {
        for (; 1 <= u && u <= n; f[u] += x, u += lowbit(u));
    }
    auto query(int u, T x = T()) -> T {
        for (; u; x += f[u], u -= lowbit(u)); return x;
    }
    auto find_first(T x) -> int {
        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 1 << std::__lg(n); i; i >>= 1) {
            if ((res | i) <= n && f[res | i] < x)
                x -= f[res | i];
        }
        return res + 1;
    }
    #undef lowbit
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<T> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
线段树是一种维护序列区间信息的数据结构，该信息需要满足结合律

  • 结合律: 设 $L$ 为左半部分信息，$R$ 为右半部分信息，那么需要满足 $L \ opt \ R = R \ opt \ L$

操作:

  • update(u, x): 将原序列的 u 位置依据 x 去更新
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • update(l, r, x) : 将原序列的 $[l, r]$ 区间依据 x 去更新
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • query(l, r): 查询原序列 $[l, r]$ 的区间信息
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • find_first(l, r, check): 找到原序列 $[L, R]$ 的第一个 check(true) 的位置
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$
  • find_first(l, r, check): 找到原序列 $[L, R]$ 最后一个 check(true) 的位置
    • 复杂度: $O(logn)$

docs.title: 单点修改
docs.text:
template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

docs.title: 扫描线
docs.text:
std::vector<int> all = {-1};

struct info {
    int len, tag;
    info()
    : len(0), tag(0) {}
    info(int _len, int _tag)
    : len(_len), tag(_tag) {}
}

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        if (f[p].tag)
            f[p].len = all[r + 1] - all[l];
        else if (l != r)
            f[p].len = f[lson].len + f[rson].len;
        else
            f[p].len = 0;
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, int x) -> void {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return (void)(f[p].tag += x, push_up(p, l, r));
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return 0;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return f[p].len;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
ST表是一种离线的维护区间信息的数据结构，该信息需要满足结合律

  • 结合律: 设 $L$ 为左半部分信息，$R$ 为右半部分信息，那么需要满足 $L \ opt \ R = R \ opt \ L$

操作:

  • query(l, r): 查询 $[l, r]$ 的信息
    • 复杂度: $O(1)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename T> struct sparse_table {
public:
    sparse_table(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(std::__lg(n) + 1, std::vector<T>(_n + 1)) {}
    sparse_table(std::vector<T> info, auto &check)
    : sparse_table(info.size() - 1) {
        f[0] = info;
        for (int k = 1; k <= std::__lg(n); ++k)
            for (int i = 1; i + (1 << k) - 1 <= n; ++i)
                f[k][i] = check(f[k - 1][i], f[k - 1][i + (1 << k - 1)]);
    }
    auto query(int l, int r, auto &check) -> T {
        int k = std::__lg(r - l + 1);
        return check(f[k][l], f[k][r - (1 << k) + 1]);
    }
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<std::vector<T>> f;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text: 模数类是一种对值自动取模的类，在一类组合计数的题中不用担心自己哪里没有取模到位，十分方便

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
template <typename T>
constexpr auto quick_power(T a, uInt b, T res = T(1)) -> T {
    for (; b; a *= a, b >>= 1) if (b & 1) res *= a; return res;
}

template <Int P> struct mod_int {
public:
    static Int M;
    constexpr static Int get_mod() {
        return P ? P : M;
    }
    constexpr static void set_mod(Int _M) {
        M = _M;
    }
    constexpr mod_int(Int _x = 0)
    : x(check(_x % get_mod())) {}
    constexpr Int check(Int val) const {
        if (val < 0)
            val += get_mod();
        if (val >= get_mod())
            val -= get_mod();
        return val;
    }
    constexpr mod_int inv() const {
        return quick_power(*this, get_mod() - 2);
    }
    constexpr mod_int operator - () const {
        return mod_int(check(get_mod() - *this));
    }
    constexpr mod_int &operator += (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x + other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator -= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x - other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator *= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.x % get_mod()); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator /= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.inv() % get_mod()); return *this; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator + (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l += r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator - (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l -= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator * (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l *= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator / (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l /= r; }
    friend constexpr bool operator == (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x == r.x; }
    friend constexpr bool operator != (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x != r.x; }
    friend constexpr std::istream &operator >> (std::istream &is, mod_int &val) {
        return is >> val.x, val = mod_int(val.x), is;
    }
    friend constexpr std::ostream &operator << (std::ostream &os, const mod_int &val) {
        return os << val.x;
    }
private:
    Int x;
};

docs.title: 介绍
docs.text:
字符串哈希是使用两个数 $Base$ 和 $Mod$，将一个字符串序列的子串的值都映射到 $[0, Mod)$，虽然会有冲突概率，但也不失是字符串算法中的基础算法，以及解决相关问题的高效算法

操作:

  • query(l, r): 查询原字符串 $[l, r]$ 的哈希值
    • 复杂度: $O(1)$

docs.title: 模数哈希
docs.text:
template <uInt B, uInt P> struct string_hash_mInt {
public:
    string_hash_mInt(const std::string &s, const char offset = 'a')
    : n(s.size()), hash(s.size() + 1), base(s.size() + 1, 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            base[i + 1] = base[i] * B % P;
            hash[i + 1] = (hash[i] + (s[i] - offset) * base[i] % P) % P;
        }
    }
    auto query(int l, int r) -> uInt {
        return (hash[r] - hash[l - 1] + P) % P * base[n - l + 1] % P; 
    }
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<uInt> hash, base;
};

docs.title: 自然溢出哈希
docs.text:
template <uInt B> struct string_hash {
public:
    string_hash(const std::string &s = "", const char offset = 'a')
    : n(s.size()), hash(s.size() + 1, 1), base(s.size() + 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            base[i + 1] = base[i] * B;
            hash[i + 1] = hash[i] + (s[i] - offset) * base[i];
        }
    }
    auto query(int l, int r) -> uInt {
        return (hash[r] - hash[l - 1]) * base[n - l + 1];
    }
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<uInt> hash, base;
};

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你 $n$ 个点，每个点均有一个价值 $x$，查询每个大小为 $H \times W$ 的矩阵的最大价值和

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 转换为扫描线问题即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

struct lazy {
    Int val;
    lazy()
    : val(0) {}
    lazy(Int _val)
    : val(_val) {}
    lazy &operator += (lazy tag) {
        return val += tag.val, *this;
    }  
};

struct info {
    Int val;
    info()
    : val(0) {}
    info(Int _val)
    : val(_val) {}
    info &operator += (lazy tag) {
        return val += tag.val, *this;
    }
    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(std::max(l.val, r.val));
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, X, Y;
    std::cin >> n >> X >> Y;

    std::vector<int> all;
    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> pos;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        int x, y, v;
        std::cin >> x >> y >> v;
        all.push_back(y);
        all.push_back(y - Y + 1);
        pos.push_back({x, y, v});
        pos.push_back({x + X, y, -v});
    }

    std::sort(pos.begin(), pos.end(), [&](auto &l, auto &r) {
        if (l[0] != r[0])
            return l[0] < r[0];
        else
            return l[1] < r[1];
    });
    std::sort(all.begin(), all.end());
    all.erase(std::unique(all.begin(), all.end()), all.end());

    auto rank = [&all](int x) -> int {
        return std::lower_bound(all.begin(), all.end(), x) - all.begin() + 1;
    };

    Int res = 0, m = all.size();
    segment_tree<info, lazy> seg(m);

    for (int i = 0; i < pos.size() - 1; i++) {
        auto [x, y, v] = pos[i];
        seg.update(1, 1, m, rank(y - Y + 1), rank(y), lazy(v));
        if (x != pos[i + 1][0])
            res = std::max(res, seg.query(1, 1, m, 1, m).val);
    }

    std::cout << res << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 每次询问 $[L, R]$ 区间的端点值是否是区间最大值和次大值，且 $val_L > val_R$，中间有一些值没有给出

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 处理每个数的前一个最大值位置，和后一个最大值位置，分类讨论即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::map<int, int> cnt;
    std::vector<int> all = {(int)(-2e9)};
    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> info(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cin >> info[i].first >> info[i].second;
        cnt[info[i].first] = info[i].second;
        all.push_back(info[i].first);
    }
    info[0].first = all[0];

    std::vector<int> pre_max(n + 1), stk1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        while (!stk1.empty() && info[stk1.back()].second < info[i].second)
            stk1.pop_back();
        if (!stk1.empty())
            pre_max[i] = stk1.back();
        stk1.push_back(i);
    }

    std::vector<int> nxt_max(n + 1), stk2;
    for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) {
        while (!stk2.empty() && info[stk2.back()].second < info[i].second)
            stk2.pop_back();
        if (!stk2.empty())
            nxt_max[i] = stk2.back();
        stk2.push_back(i);
    }

    int m;
    std::cin >> m;

    auto count = [&](int x) -> bool {
        return std::binary_search(all.begin(), all.end(), x);
    };

    auto rank = [&](int x) -> int {
        return std::lower_bound(all.begin(), all.end(), x) - all.begin();
    };

    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int x, y;
        std::cin >> x >> y;

        if (!count(x) && !count(y)) {
            std::cout << "maybe\n";
        } else if (!count(x)) {
            int idx_y = rank(y);
            if (x < info[pre_max[idx_y]].first) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else {
                std::cout << "maybe\n";
            }
        } else if (!count(y)) {
            int idx_x = rank(x);
            if (nxt_max[idx_x] != 0 && info[nxt_max[idx_x]].first < y) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else {
                std::cout << "maybe\n";
            }
        } else {
            int idx_x = rank(x), idx_y = rank(y);
            if (info[idx_x].second < info[idx_y].second) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else if (idx_x < pre_max[idx_y]) {
                std::cout << "false\n";
            } else if (idx_y - idx_x != y - x) {
                std::cout << "maybe\n";
            } else {
                std::cout << "true\n";
            }
        }
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的排列，共有 $m$ 次操作，每次操作可以将 $[L, R]$ 的数选择升序排序或降序排序，问最后位于 $x$ 的是哪个数

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
首先考虑对一个 $01$ 序列排序的时间复杂度，只需要将区间分为两段，一段全置 $1$，一段全置 $0$ 即可，用线段树维护复杂度 $log(n)$

那么考虑二分答案，初始状态将 $<= x$ 的数全部设置为 $1$，将 $> x$ 的数全部设置为 $0$，模拟一遍即可

总复杂度 $O(mlognlogn)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

struct lazy {
    int val;
    lazy()
    : val(-1) {}
    lazy(int _val)
    : val(_val) {}

    lazy &operator += (lazy tag) {
        if (tag.val == -1)
            return *this;
        else
            return val = tag.val, *this;
    }
};

struct info {
    int val, siz;
    info()
    : val(0), siz(0) {}
    info(int _val, int _siz)
    : val(_val), siz(_siz) {}

    info &operator += (lazy tag) {
        if (tag.val == -1)
            return *this;
        else
            return val = siz * tag.val, *this;
    }

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(l.val + r.val, l.siz + r.siz);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];

    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> opt(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cin >> opt[i][0] >> opt[i][1] >> opt[i][2];

    int target;
    std::cin >> target;

    auto check = [&](int x) -> bool {
        std::vector<info> INFO(n + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            INFO[i].val = a[i] >= x;
            INFO[i].siz = 1;
        }

        segment_tree<info, lazy> seg(INFO);
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            auto &[op, l, r] = opt[i];

            int val = seg.query(1, 1, n, l, r).val;

            if (op == 0) {
                seg.update(1, 1, n, l, r - val, 0);
                seg.update(1, 1, n, r - val + 1, r, 1);
            } else {
                seg.update(1, 1, n, l, l + val - 1, 1);
                seg.update(1, 1, n, l + val, r, 0);
            }
        }

        return seg.query(1, 1, n, target, target).val;
    };

    int l = 1, r = n;
    while (l + 1 < r) {
        int mid = l + r >> 1;
        if (check(mid))
            l = mid;
        else
            r = mid;
    }

    if (check(r))
        std::cout << r << '\n';
    else
        std::cout << l << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的排列，共询问 $m$ 个区间 $[L, R]$，如果存在 $L \le i < j \le R$，$L$ 和 $R$ 是最大值和次大值获得 $X$ 点贡献，如果只有一个是最大值，无次大值，获得 $Y$ 点贡献，问区间 $[L, R]$ 的贡献是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑将贡献转化，转换成离线二维数点，将每个区间看作 $(l, r)$，那么一次查询 $[L, R]$ 则是查询 $(L, L)$ 到 $(R, R)$ 这个矩形内有多少个满足 $X$ 和 $Y$ 贡献的点

预处理前一个的最大值和后一个的最大值，分别为 $Prev$ 和 $Next$，那么有:

  • $(Prev_i, Next_i)$ 有贡献 $X$
  • $([Prev_i + 1, i - 1], Next_i)$ 有贡献 $Y$
  • $(Prev_i, [i + 1, Next_i - 1])$ 有贡献 $Y$

接下来二维数点板子即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
};

auto get_prev(int n, std::vector<int> &a) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> prev, stk;
    prev.assign(n + 1, 0);
    stk.clear();

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        while (!stk.empty() && a[stk.back()] < a[i])
            stk.pop_back();
        if (!stk.empty())
            prev[i] = stk.back();
        stk.push_back(i);
    }

    return prev;
}

auto get_next(int n, std::vector<int> &a) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> next, stk;
    next.assign(n + 2, n + 1);
    stk.clear();

    for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) {
        while (!stk.empty() && a[stk.back()] < a[i])
            stk.pop_back();
        if (!stk.empty())
            next[i] = stk.back();
        stk.push_back(i);
    }

    return next;
}

struct lazy {
    Int x, y;
    lazy()
    : x(0), y(0) {}
    lazy(Int _x, Int _y)
    : x(_x), y(_y) {}

    lazy &operator += (lazy tag) {
        x += tag.x;
        y += tag.y;
        return *this;
    }
};

struct info {
    Int x, y, siz;
    info()
    : x(0), y(0), siz(0) {}
    info(Int _x, Int _y, Int _siz)
    : x(_x), y(_y), siz(_siz) {}

    info &operator += (lazy tag) {
        x += tag.x * siz;
        y += tag.y * siz;
        return *this;
    }

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(l.x + r.x, l.y + r.y, l.siz + r.siz);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, x, y;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> x >> y;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];

    std::vector<int> prev = get_prev(n, a);
    std::vector<int> next = get_next(n, a);

    std::vector<std::array<int, 5>> opt;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int l, r;
        std::cin >> l >> r;
        opt.push_back({l - 1, l, r, i, -1});
        opt.push_back({r, l, r, i,  1});
    }
    std::sort(opt.begin(), opt.end());

    std::vector<std::array<int, 4>> upd;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        if (1 <= prev[i] && next[i] <= n)
            upd.push_back({next[i], prev[i], prev[i], 1});
        if (1 <= prev[i] && next[i] - 1 > i)
            upd.push_back({prev[i], i + 1, next[i] - 1, 0});
        if (n >= next[i] && prev[i] + 1 < i)
            upd.push_back({next[i], prev[i] + 1, i - 1, 0});
    }
    std::sort(upd.begin(), upd.end());

    int idx = 0;
    std::vector<Int> res(m + 1);
    segment_tree<info, lazy> seg(std::vector<info>(n + 1, info(0, 0, 1)));
    for (auto &[now, l, r, id, tag] : opt) {
        while (idx < upd.size() && upd[idx][0] <= now) {
            auto [u, l, r, v] = upd[idx++];
            seg.update(1, 1, n, l, r, lazy(v, v ^ 1));
        }
        auto [a, b, c] = seg.query(1, 1, n, l, r);
        res[id] += (a * x + b * y) * tag;
        if (tag == 1) res[id] += (r - l) * x;
    }

    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cout << res[i] << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 给你一个大小为 $n$ 的序列，共有 $m$ 次操作，每次操作后查找从 $1$ 开始的最长的递增序列，其中忽略为 $0$ 的项

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑最长递增子序列是如何维护的，二分新加进来的数所能放置的位置

如果是两个递增序列合并呢？

设左递增序列为 $p_1, p_2, ..., p_x$，右递增序列为 $q_1, q_2, ..., q_y$

那么合并两序列需要找到 $p_x$ 在 $q_1, ..., q_y$ 中所能处的位置

而我线段树上，已经将 $q_1, .., q_y$ 的信息存储了，故而只需要在线段树上二分即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info, typename Node> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p, l, r);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto maintain(int p, int l, int r, Node pre) -> int {
        if (f[p].pos <= pre)
            return 0;
        if (l == r)
            return pre < f[p].pos;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        if (f[lson].pos <= pre)
            return maintain(rson, m + 1, r, pre);
        else
            return maintain(lson, l, m, pre) + f[p].val - f[lson].val;
    }
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        f[p].pos = std::max(f[lson].pos, f[rson].pos);
        f[p].val = f[lson].val + maintain(rson, (l + r >> 1) + 1, r, f[lson].pos);
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return 0;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p].val;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

struct node {
    int x, y;
    node()
    : x(0), y(0) {}
    node(int _x, int _y)
    : x(_x), y(_y) {}

    friend bool operator < (node l, node r) {
        return (Int)l.y * r.x <  (Int)r.y * l.x;
    }
    friend bool operator <= (node l, node r) {
        return (Int)l.y * r.x <= (Int)r.y * l.x;
    }
};

struct info {
    node pos;
    int  val;
    info()
    : pos(node()), val(0) {}
    info(node _pos, int _val)
    : pos(_pos), val(_val) {}
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<info> init(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        init[i].pos.x = i;

    segment_tree<info, node> seg(init);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        node tmp;
        std::cin >> tmp.x >> tmp.y;
        seg.update(1, 1, n, tmp.x, info(tmp, 1));
        std::cout << seg.query(1, 1, n, 1, n) << '\n';
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

constexpr Int INV_INF = -1e18;

struct info {
    Int pref, suff, sum, res;
    info()
    : pref(INV_INF), suff(INV_INF), sum(INV_INF), res(INV_INF) {}
    info(Int _pref, Int _suff, Int _sum, Int _res)
    : pref(_pref), suff(_suff), sum(_sum), res(_res) {}

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        info res;
        if (l.sum == INV_INF)
            return r;
        if (r.sum == INV_INF)
            return l;
        res.pref = std::max(l.pref, l.sum + r.pref);
        res.suff = std::max(r.suff, r.sum + l.suff);
        res.sum = l.sum + r.sum;
        res.res = std::max({l.res, r.res, l.suff + r.pref});
        return res;
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector<info> a(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cin >> a[i].sum;
        a[i].pref = a[i].suff = a[i].res = a[i].sum;
    }

    segment_tree<info> seg(a);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int op, x, y;
        std::cin >> op >> x >> y;
        if (op == 1) {
            if (x > y) std::swap(x, y);
            std::cout << seg.query(1, 1, n, x, y).res << '\n';
        } else {
            seg.update(1, 1, n, x, info(y, y, y, y));
        }
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 题意
docs.text: 维护一个数，每次乘上一个数或除上一个数，并输出它当前的值

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 离散化后线段树维护即可

docs.title: 法1
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename T>
constexpr auto quick_power(T a, uInt b, T res = T(1)) -> T {
    for (; b; a *= a, b >>= 1) if (b & 1) res *= a; return res;
}

template <Int P> struct mod_int {
    static Int M;
    constexpr static Int get_mod() {
        return P ? P : M;
    }
    constexpr static void set_mod(Int _M) {
        M = _M;
    }
    constexpr mod_int(Int _x = 0)
    : x(check(_x % get_mod())) {}
    constexpr Int check(Int val) const {
        if (val < 0)
            val += get_mod();
        if (val >= get_mod())
            val -= get_mod();
        return val;
    }
    constexpr mod_int inv() const {
        return quick_power(*this, get_mod() - 2);
    }
    constexpr mod_int operator - () const {
        return mod_int(check(get_mod() - *this));
    }
    constexpr mod_int &operator += (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x + other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator -= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x - other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator *= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.x % get_mod()); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator /= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.inv() % get_mod()); return *this; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator + (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l += r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator - (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l -= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator * (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l *= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator / (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l /= r; }
    friend constexpr bool operator == (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x == r.x; }
    friend constexpr bool operator != (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x != r.x; }
    friend constexpr std::istream &operator >> (std::istream &is, mod_int &val) {
        return is >> val.x, val = mod_int(val.x), is;
    }
    friend constexpr std::ostream &operator << (std::ostream &os, const mod_int &val) {
        return os << val.x;
    }
private:
    Int x;
};

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

using mInt = mod_int<0>;
template <>
Int mInt::M = 114514;

struct info {
    mInt val;
    info() : val(mInt(1)) {}
    info(mInt _val) : val(_val) {}
    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        return info(l.val * r.val);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int q;
    std::cin >> q >> mInt::M;

    std::vector<int> all = {-1};
    std::vector<std::array<int, 2>> query(q + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++) {
        std::cin >> query[i][0] >> query[i][1];
        if (query[i][0] == 1)
            all.push_back(query[i][1]);
        else
            query[i][1] = query[query[i][1]][1];
    }

    std::sort(all.begin(), all.end());
    all.erase(std::unique(all.begin(), all.end()), all.end());

    auto rank = [&all](int x) -> int {
        return std::lower_bound(all.begin(), all.end(), x) - all.begin();
    };

    int n = all.size() - 1;
    std::map<int, int> cnt;
    segment_tree<info> seg(n);

    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++) {
        auto [op, x] = query[i];

        if (op == 1)
            seg.update(1, 1, n, rank(x), info(quick_power(mInt(x), ++cnt[x])));
        else
            seg.update(1, 1, n, rank(x), info(quick_power(mInt(x), --cnt[x])));

        std::cout << seg.query(1, 1, n, 1, n).val << '\n';
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Luogu P5490 -【模板】扫描线 & 矩形面积并
Tag: 线段树，扫描线，离散化
题意
docs.text: 给你 $n$ 个二维平面上的矩形，问你这 $n$ 个矩形面积的并集是多少

docs.title: 思路
docs.text: 考虑将问题拆解为矩形面积相加，将操作维护成直线扫描即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

std::vector<int> all = {-1};

struct info {
    int len, tag;
    info()
    : len(0), tag(0) {}
    info(int _len, int _tag)
    : len(_len), tag(_tag) {}
};

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        if (f[p].tag)
            f[p].len = all[r + 1] - all[l];
        else if (l != r)
            f[p].len = f[lson].len + f[rson].len;
        else
            f[p].len = 0;
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, int x) -> void {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return (void)(f[p].tag += x, push_up(p, l, r));
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return 0;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return f[p].len;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<std::array<int, 4>> query;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        int x1, x2, y1, y2;
        std::cin >> x1 >> y1 >> x2 >> y2;
        all.push_back(y1);
        all.push_back(y2);
        query.push_back({x1, y1, y2, 1});
        query.push_back({x2, y1, y2, -1});
    }

    std::sort(all.begin(), all.end());
    all.erase(std::unique(all.begin(), all.end()), all.end());
    std::sort(query.begin(), query.end(), [](auto &l, auto &r) {
        return l[0] < r[0];
    });

    Int ans = 0, m = all.size() - 1;
    segment_tree<info> seg(m - 1);
    for (int i = 0; i < query.size() - 1; i++) {
        auto [x, y1, y2, tag] = query[i];
        seg.update(1, 1, m - 1, y1, y2, tag);
        ans += 1LL * (query[i + 1][0] - x) * seg.query(1, 1, m - 1, all[1], all[m]);
    }

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}
